subject: Probability: Definitions and Properties
question: The following spinner is spun: Find the probabilities of obtaining each of the following: (a) Pr(factor of 24) (b) Pr(multiple of 4) (c) Pr(odd number) (d) $\mathrm{Pr}(\{9\})$ (e) Pr(composite number), i.e., a number that is not prime (f) Pr(neither prime nor composite)
